Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the customer that wants to change the service in their appointment.

Parameter.Documentation: is the date and the time where the attempt for the change happened. This method is called when a customer wants to change the service in their appointment.

Parameter.Name: dateAndTime

Parameter.Documentation: is the date and time where the appointment is starting.

Parameter.Name: dateAndTime

Parameter.Documentation: This method is called when it is needed to check if a certain service in the appointment is the correct one.

Parameter.Name: serviceName

Parameter.Name: username

Parameter.Name: newTimeString

Parameter.Documentation: is the current time and date of the system
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the current time and date of the system
Parameter.Name: systemTime

Parameter.Documentation: is the date and the time where the owner tried to register a no-show.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the date and the time where the owner tried to register a no-show.
Parameter.Name: currentDateAndTime

Parameter.Documentation: is the date and time where the owner tries to end the appointment.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the date and time where the owner tries to end the appointment.
Parameter.Name: dateAndTime

Operation.Documentation:
Helper method to find a specific user

@author Eric Chehata
Operation.Documentation_plain: Helper method to find a specific user @author Eric Chehata
Operation.Name: findUser
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: User sought if found, null otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: User sought if found, null otherwise

Operation.Documentation:
findSerivceComboThis helper method has the goal of finding a specific service combo holding the name put as the input.To do that the method iterates over all the bookable services in the flexibook using a for loop.For each bookable service, if it is a service combo and it has the same name as the one in the input,then it is the service combo we are looking for and it is then returned by the method.

@author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Documentation_plain: findSerivceComboThis helper method has the goal of finding a specific service combo holding the name put as the input.To do that the method iterates over all the bookable services in the flexibook using a for loop.For each bookable service, if it is a service combo and it has the same name as the one in the input,then it is the service combo we are looking for and it is then returned by the method. @author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Name: findServiceCombo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ServiceCombo that has the name as the parameter serviceCombo.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ServiceCombo that has the name as the parameter serviceCombo.

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the service combo to be found.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of the service combo to be found.
Parameter.Name: serviceCombo

Operation.Name: findCustomer
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: Customer

Helper method to get the number of service combos

Helper method to get the number of services

Operation.Documentation:
Helper method to get the number of appointments for a specific service

@author Marc Saber
Operation.Documentation_plain: Helper method to get the number of appointments for a specific service @author Marc Saber
Operation.Name: getNumAppForService

Operation.Documentation:
joinServicesjoinServices is a method that has the goal of listing all the services' names in one string by separating them by a ",".The first step to do it was to create an empty string, then take each service in the service combo and add its name to the end of the string.If it is the last service, only the name is added to the string of services.If it is not the last one, the name is added followed by a ",".By doing that for all the services we create a single string having all the names of the services of the given service combo.The last step is certainly to return this final string.

@author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Documentation_plain: joinServicesjoinServices is a method that has the goal of listing all the services' names in one string by separating them by a ",".The first step to do it was to create an empty string, then take each service in the service combo and add its name to the end of the string.If it is the last service, only the name is added to the string of services.If it is not the last one, the name is added followed by a ",".By doing that for all the services we create a single string having all the names of the services of the given service combo.The last step is certainly to return this final string. @author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Name: joinServices
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: String that has all the services in the service combo put as the input
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: String that has all the services in the service combo put as the input

Parameter.Documentation: is the service combo that has the services we want to have in the form of a string.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the service combo that has the services we want to have in the form of a string.
Parameter.Name: sc

Operation.Documentation:
joinMandatoriesjoinMandatories is a method that has the goal of listing all the services' mandatory statuses in one string by separating them by a ",".The first step to do it was to create an empty string, then take each service in the service combo and add its mandatory status to the end of the string.If it is the last service, only the mandatory status is added to the string of .If it is not the last one, the mandatory status is added followed by a ",".By doing that for all the services we create a single string having all the mandatory statuses of the services of the given service combo.The last step is certainly to return this final string.

@author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Documentation_plain: joinMandatoriesjoinMandatories is a method that has the goal of listing all the services' mandatory statuses in one string by separating them by a ",".The first step to do it was to create an empty string, then take each service in the service combo and add its mandatory status to the end of the string.If it is the last service, only the mandatory status is added to the string of .If it is not the last one, the mandatory status is added followed by a ",".By doing that for all the services we create a single string having all the mandatory statuses of the services of the given service combo.The last step is certainly to return this final string. @author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Name: joinMandatories
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: String that has all the mandatory status of all the services in the service combo put as the input.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: String that has all the mandatory status of all the services in the service combo put as the input.

Parameter.Documentation: is the service combo that has the services we want to find their corresponding mandatory status and have them in the form of a string.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the service combo that has the services we want to find their corresponding mandatory status and have them in the form of a string.
Parameter.Name: sc

Operation.Documentation:
The findTimeSlotOfApp is a helper method that calculates the time slot of an appointmentdepending on the start time, start date and duration of the appointment.

@author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Documentation_plain: The findTimeSlotOfApp is a helper method that calculates the time slot of an appointmentdepending on the start time, start date and duration of the appointment. @author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Name: findTimeSlotOfApp

Operation.Documentation:
The findAppointment method is a helper method that finds the desired appointment in the flexibookapplication using the username of the customer, and his appointment information(name, date, starttime).

@author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Documentation_plain: The findAppointment method is a helper method that finds the desired appointment in the flexibookapplication using the username of the customer, and his appointment information(name, date, starttime). @author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Name: findAppointment

Operation.Documentation: the services should be {ordered}; however, since Umple translates every * associationor composition into a list, it is possible to order items in that list given Umple's API
Operation.Documentation_plain: the services should be {ordered}; however, since Umple translates every * associationor composition into a list, it is possible to order items in that list given Umple's API
Operation.Name: getServices

Operation.Documentation: since there is only one business in this system, the first0..1 should be a 1. since this is a directed association, thefirst multiplicity is not taken into account. hence, it ischanged to 0..1 to avoid Umple issuing warning W036Unmanaged Multiplicity
Operation.Documentation_plain: since there is only one business in this system, the first0..1 should be a 1. since this is a directed association, thefirst multiplicity is not taken into account. hence, it ischanged to 0..1 to avoid Umple issuing warning W036Unmanaged Multiplicity
Operation.Name: getBusinessHours

Parameter.Documentation: Constructor used in the FlexiBookApplication class to initialize the user interface.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: Constructor used in the FlexiBookApplication class to initialize the user interface.
Parameter.Name: stage

Parameter.Documentation: Method for the whole user interface.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: Method for the whole user interface.
Parameter.Name: primaryStage

Operation.Documentation:
Login as customer or owner.As an owner, I want to log in so that I can access the space to manage my business.As a customer, I want to log in so that I can manage my appointments.The owner account is created automatically if it does not exist.

@author Eric Chehata
Operation.Documentation_plain: Login as customer or owner.As an owner, I want to log in so that I can access the space to manage my business.As a customer, I want to log in so that I can manage my appointments.The owner account is created automatically if it does not exist. @author Eric Chehata
Operation.Name: login
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation:
Nothing

@throws InvalidInputException: if username doesn't match any customer in the system or if the the password entered is wrong.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: Nothing @throws InvalidInputException: if username doesn't match any customer in the system or if the the password entered is wrong.

Operation.Documentation:
Logout.As a user, I want to log out of the application so that the next user does not have access to my information

@author Eric Chehata
Operation.Documentation_plain: Logout.As a user, I want to log out of the application so that the next user does not have access to my information @author Eric Chehata
Operation.Name: logout
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation:
Nothing

@throws InvalidInputException: if user is already logged out.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: Nothing @throws InvalidInputException: if user is already logged out.

Operation.Documentation:
View appointment calendarAs a user, I want to view the appointment calendar so that I can select a time slot for my appointment and/or browse my scheduled appointments.

@author Eric Chehata
Operation.Documentation_plain: View appointment calendarAs a user, I want to view the appointment calendar so that I can select a time slot for my appointment and/or browse my scheduled appointments. @author Eric Chehata
Operation.Name: viewAppointmentCalendar
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation:
TOAppointmentCalendarItem items that contains a list of the TO available time slots in the system and a list of the TO unavailable time slots in the system

@throws InvalidInputException: if date entered is not valid
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: TOAppointmentCalendarItem items that contains a list of the TO available time slots in the system and a list of the TO unavailable time slots in the system @throws InvalidInputException: if date entered is not valid

Operation.Documentation:
Add ServiceaddService is a method that adds a certain service to the system.This method just checks that the owner is the user trying to do the addition of a service andthat they are doing a addition of a service with correct parameters (ensured the serviceSpecificationAdd)helper method. Also it checks that the owner adds a service that does not already exist.

@author Marc Saber
Operation.Documentation_plain: Add ServiceaddService is a method that adds a certain service to the system.This method just checks that the owner is the user trying to do the addition of a service andthat they are doing a addition of a service with correct parameters (ensured the serviceSpecificationAdd)helper method. Also it checks that the owner adds a service that does not already exist. @author Marc Saber
Operation.Name: addService
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException when a customer tries to add a service, or when an owner tries to add a service that already exists, or even when he tries to add a service that does not exist,but that has invalid parameters creating conflict with the system in the(serviceSpecificationAdd) helper method.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException when a customer tries to add a service, or when an owner tries to add a service that already exists, or even when he tries to add a service that does not exist,but that has invalid parameters creating conflict with the system in the(serviceSpecificationAdd) helper method.

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the service to add.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of the service to add.
Parameter.Name: serviceName

Parameter.Documentation: is the duration of the service to add.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the duration of the service to add.
Parameter.Name: duration

Parameter.Documentation: is the downtime duration of the service to add.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the downtime duration of the service to add.
Parameter.Name: downtimeDuration

Parameter.Documentation: is the start time of the downtime of the service to add.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the start time of the downtime of the service to add.
Parameter.Name: downtimeStart

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of FlexiBookApplication user (could be a customer or an owner).
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of FlexiBookApplication user (could be a customer or an owner).
Parameter.Name: user

Operation.Documentation:
Delete ServicedeleteService is a method that deletes a certain service from the system.This method just checks that the owner is the user trying to do the deletion of a service andthat they are doing a deletion of a service without future appointments.It also checks if this specific service is contained in a service combo. If it is, and is amandatory service, it deletes the service combo too . But if it's not mandatory,it just deletes the service.Finally, if the service is not including in future appointments, and not in service combosit just deletes the service.

@author Marc Saber
Operation.Documentation_plain: Delete ServicedeleteService is a method that deletes a certain service from the system.This method just checks that the owner is the user trying to do the deletion of a service andthat they are doing a deletion of a service without future appointments.It also checks if this specific service is contained in a service combo. If it is, and is amandatory service, it deletes the service combo too . But if it's not mandatory,it just deletes the service.Finally, if the service is not including in future appointments, and not in service combosit just deletes the service. @author Marc Saber
Operation.Name: deleteService
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException when a customer tries to delete a service, or when an owner tries to delete a service contained in future appointments.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException when a customer tries to delete a service, or when an owner tries to delete a service contained in future appointments.

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the service to be deleted
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of the service to be deleted
Parameter.Name: service

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of FlexiBookApplication user (could be a customer or an owner).
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of FlexiBookApplication user (could be a customer or an owner).
Parameter.Name: username

Operation.Documentation:
Update ServiceupdateService is a method where an owner can update a service.This specific service to be updated has parameters that are replaced with the ones that are set.First thing to do was checking wether the user is a customer or an owner, in order to seeif they are allowed to update the service. If they are an owner, the service couldbe updated, if not the customer is not authorized to perform this operation.Then checking the inserted parameters' validity, by using the helper methodserviceSpecificationUpdateAfter that, to update the service, the method looks for the service with the old name(using the findService helper method),and sets its new parameters.By doing that the service has completely changed its parameters which means it has been updated.

@author Marc Saber
Operation.Documentation_plain: Update ServiceupdateService is a method where an owner can update a service.This specific service to be updated has parameters that are replaced with the ones that are set.First thing to do was checking wether the user is a customer or an owner, in order to seeif they are allowed to update the service. If they are an owner, the service couldbe updated, if not the customer is not authorized to perform this operation.Then checking the inserted parameters' validity, by using the helper methodserviceSpecificationUpdateAfter that, to update the service, the method looks for the service with the old name(using the findService helper method),and sets its new parameters.By doing that the service has completely changed its parameters which means it has been updated. @author Marc Saber
Operation.Name: updateService
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException in the case where a customer tried to update a service or when an owner is doing so, but with parameters creating conflict with the system in the(serviceSpecificationUpdate) helper method.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException in the case where a customer tried to update a service or when an owner is doing so, but with parameters creating conflict with the system in the(serviceSpecificationUpdate) helper method.

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the service to be found.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of the service to be found.
Parameter.Name: service

Parameter.Documentation: is the updated duration of the service.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the updated duration of the service.
Parameter.Name: duration

Parameter.Documentation: is the updated downtime time of the service.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the updated downtime time of the service.
Parameter.Name: downtimeDuration

Parameter.Documentation: is the updated start time of the downtime of a service.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the updated start time of the downtime of a service.
Parameter.Name: downtimeStart

Parameter.Documentation: is the FlexiBookApplication user (could be a customer or an owner).
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the FlexiBookApplication user (could be a customer or an owner).
Parameter.Name: user

Parameter.Documentation: is the new name of the service to be updated.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the new name of the service to be updated.
Parameter.Name: serviceName

Operation.Documentation:
Registers a customer account given a username and password

@author Mohammad Saeid Nafar
Operation.Documentation_plain: Registers a customer account given a username and password @author Mohammad Saeid Nafar
Operation.Name: signUpCustomerAccount
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException

Operation.Documentation:
Updates a user account by setting a new username and and a new passowrd to the account

@author Mohammad Saeid Nafar
Operation.Documentation_plain: Updates a user account by setting a new username and and a new passowrd to the account @author Mohammad Saeid Nafar
Operation.Name: updateAccount
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException

Operation.Documentation:
Deletes a customer account given a username

@author Mohammad Saeid Nafar
Operation.Documentation_plain: Deletes a customer account given a username @author Mohammad Saeid Nafar
Operation.Name: deleteCustomerAccount
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException

Operation.Documentation:
1. Define ServiceCombodefineServiceCombo is a method that basically is taking the previously mentioned parameters and creates a service combo using them.The first step is to check is the user defining the service combo is the owner. Then the method makes sure the parameters inserted are applicable to the system.The next step is to create combo items that are assigned to a newly created service combo and applying the parameter to that service combo by manipulating the input strings.

@author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Documentation_plain: 1. Define ServiceCombodefineServiceCombo is a method that basically is taking the previously mentioned parameters and creates a service combo using them.The first step is to check is the user defining the service combo is the owner. Then the method makes sure the parameters inserted are applicable to the system.The next step is to create combo items that are assigned to a newly created service combo and applying the parameter to that service combo by manipulating the input strings. @author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Name: defineServiceCombo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException in the case where a customer tried to define a service combo or an owner is trying to define a service combo with parameters that create conflicts with the system.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException in the case where a customer tried to define a service combo or an owner is trying to define a service combo with parameters that create conflicts with the system.

Parameter.Documentation: is the username of the user trying to define a service combo
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the username of the user trying to define a service combo
Parameter.Name: ownerName

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the service combo to be defined
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of the service combo to be defined
Parameter.Name: SCname

Parameter.Documentation: is the main Service of the service combo to be defined
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the main Service of the service combo to be defined
Parameter.Name: mainService

Parameter.Documentation: is a string that contains the names of the services that should be included in the service combo that is to be defined
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is a string that contains the names of the services that should be included in the service combo that is to be defined
Parameter.Name: services

Parameter.Documentation: is a string containing all the mandatory status of each service in correspondence with the service with the same "index" in the previous parameter (the services names)
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is a string containing all the mandatory status of each service in correspondence with the service with the same "index" in the previous parameter (the services names)
Parameter.Name: mandatory

Operation.Documentation:
2. Update ServiceComboupdateServiceCombo is a method that must use the previously mentioned input to have an updated service combo.The chosen service combo has parameters that are to be replaceed with the ones that are in the input.In this method, the first step was to check that the user trying to update a service combo is the owner.The next step was to make the inserted parameters are valid and that they do not create any conflicts with the system.After that, to update the service combo, the method looks for the service combo with the old name, then deletes all its parameters then adds the new parameters to the service combo.By doing that the service combo has completely changed its parameters which means it has been updated.

@author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Documentation_plain: 2. Update ServiceComboupdateServiceCombo is a method that must use the previously mentioned input to have an updated service combo.The chosen service combo has parameters that are to be replaceed with the ones that are in the input.In this method, the first step was to check that the user trying to update a service combo is the owner.The next step was to make the inserted parameters are valid and that they do not create any conflicts with the system.After that, to update the service combo, the method looks for the service combo with the old name, then deletes all its parameters then adds the new parameters to the service combo.By doing that the service combo has completely changed its parameters which means it has been updated. @author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Name: updateServiceCombo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException in the case where a customer tried to update a service combo or an owner is trying to update a service combo with parameters that create conflicts with the system.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException in the case where a customer tried to update a service combo or an owner is trying to update a service combo with parameters that create conflicts with the system.

Parameter.Documentation: is the username of the user trying to update a service combo.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the username of the user trying to update a service combo.
Parameter.Name: ownerName

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the service combo to be updated.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of the service combo to be updated.
Parameter.Name: SCOldName

Parameter.Documentation: is the new name for the service combo after being updated.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the new name for the service combo after being updated.
Parameter.Name: newSCName

Parameter.Documentation: is the main Service of the service combo to be after the update.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the main Service of the service combo to be after the update.
Parameter.Name: mainService

Parameter.Documentation: is a string that contains the names of the services that should be included in the service combo after being updated.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is a string that contains the names of the services that should be included in the service combo after being updated.
Parameter.Name: services

Parameter.Documentation: is a string containing all the mandatory status of each service in correspondence with the service with the same "index" in the previous parameter (the services names) after the update of the service combo.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is a string containing all the mandatory status of each service in correspondence with the service with the same "index" in the previous parameter (the services names) after the update of the service combo.
Parameter.Name: mandatory

Operation.Documentation:
3. Delete ServiceCombodeleteServiceCombo is a method that deletes a certain service combo from the system.The first step is to check that the owner is the user trying to do the deletion and that they are doing a deletion of a service combo without future appointments.The next step is to simply eliminate, delete the service combo from the system.

@author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Documentation_plain: 3. Delete ServiceCombodeleteServiceCombo is a method that deletes a certain service combo from the system.The first step is to check that the owner is the user trying to do the deletion and that they are doing a deletion of a service combo without future appointments.The next step is to simply eliminate, delete the service combo from the system. @author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Name: deleteServiceCombo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException is for the case where a customer tries to delete a service combo or when an owner tried to delete a service combo with future appointments.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException is for the case where a customer tries to delete a service combo or when an owner tried to delete a service combo with future appointments.

Parameter.Documentation: is the username of the user trying to update a service combo.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the username of the user trying to update a service combo.
Parameter.Name: ownerName

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the service combo to be deleted.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of the service combo to be deleted.
Parameter.Name: scDelete

Operation.Documentation:
This method is used to set up the contact information for a new business in the flexibook application.

@author Fadi Tawfik Beshay
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method is used to set up the contact information for a new business in the flexibook application. @author Fadi Tawfik Beshay
Operation.Name: SetUpContactInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException

Parameter.Documentation: business name stored as string
Parameter.Documentation_plain: business name stored as string
Parameter.Name: name

Parameter.Documentation: business address stored as string
Parameter.Documentation_plain: business address stored as string
Parameter.Name: address

Parameter.Documentation: business phone number stored as string
Parameter.Documentation_plain: business phone number stored as string
Parameter.Name: phoneNumber

Parameter.Documentation: business email stored as string
Parameter.Documentation_plain: business email stored as string
Parameter.Name: email

Parameter.Documentation: Time object representing end time of the business hours

Parameter.Name: temp3

a string list containing the name, address, phone number and email of the business

@throws InvalidInputException

Operation.Documentation:
The makeAppointment method takes for input the username of the customer, the name of the service desired,the optional services if the service desired is a service combo and the desired date and time.It creates an appointment for the customer in the flexibook application with the inputs. If theappointment is unsuccessful due to various reasons, an error is thrown and the system reportsthe reason it failed.

@author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Documentation_plain: The makeAppointment method takes for input the username of the customer, the name of the service desired,the optional services if the service desired is a service combo and the desired date and time.It creates an appointment for the customer in the flexibook application with the inputs. If theappointment is unsuccessful due to various reasons, an error is thrown and the system reportsthe reason it failed. @author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Name: makeAppointment
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException

Parameter.Documentation: is the username of the user
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the username of the user
Parameter.Name: customerString

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the service (and the name of the appointment)
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of the service (and the name of the appointment)
Parameter.Name: serviceName

Parameter.Documentation: is the optional services (it is null if the user desires a service and not a service combo)
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the optional services (it is null if the user desires a service and not a service combo)
Parameter.Name: optionalServicesString

Parameter.Documentation: is the desired date of the appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the desired date of the appointment
Parameter.Name: startDateString

Parameter.Documentation: is the desired time of the appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the desired time of the appointment
Parameter.Name: startTimeString

Operation.Documentation:
The UpdateAppointment method takes for input the username of the customer, his/herappointment name, the date and time of the appointment, the new date and time of theappointment, the desired action (remove or add) and the desired ComboItem to remove/add.If the customer wants to change the time or date of the appointment, then the inputs action anditem string will be equal to null. The method will update the appointment and the system willreturn whether the update was successful or not.If the customer wants to add or remove a ComboItem from their service combo, the newDateStringand newStartTimeString inputs will have to be the same as oldDateString and oldStartTimeString.Then depending on the chosen action, the method updates the appointment and the system throwswhether it was successful or not.The first two input parameters are always set the same unless it is a random user or the ownerwho is trying to update the appointment of another customer. In this case the two first inputsare not equal and the system throws an error.

@author Eric Chehata
Operation.Documentation_plain: The UpdateAppointment method takes for input the username of the customer, his/herappointment name, the date and time of the appointment, the new date and time of theappointment, the desired action (remove or add) and the desired ComboItem to remove/add.If the customer wants to change the time or date of the appointment, then the inputs action anditem string will be equal to null. The method will update the appointment and the system willreturn whether the update was successful or not.If the customer wants to add or remove a ComboItem from their service combo, the newDateStringand newStartTimeString inputs will have to be the same as oldDateString and oldStartTimeString.Then depending on the chosen action, the method updates the appointment and the system throwswhether it was successful or not.The first two input parameters are always set the same unless it is a random user or the ownerwho is trying to update the appointment of another customer. In this case the two first inputsare not equal and the system throws an error. @author Eric Chehata
Operation.Name: updateAppointment
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException

Parameter.Documentation: is a username
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is a username
Parameter.Name: user

Parameter.Documentation: is the customer's username
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the customer's username
Parameter.Name: customerString

Parameter.Documentation: is the service name and the appointment name
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the service name and the appointment name
Parameter.Name: appointmentName

Parameter.Documentation: is the old date of the appointment before the update
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the old date of the appointment before the update
Parameter.Name: oldDateString

Parameter.Documentation: is the old date of the appointment before the update
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the old date of the appointment before the update
Parameter.Name: oldStartTimeString

Parameter.Documentation: is the new desired date of the appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the new desired date of the appointment
Parameter.Name: newDateString

Parameter.Documentation: is the new desired time of the appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the new desired time of the appointment
Parameter.Name: newStartTimeString

Parameter.Documentation: is the action desired (remove or add)
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the action desired (remove or add)
Parameter.Name: action

Parameter.Documentation: is the item to add or remove
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the item to add or remove
Parameter.Name: itemString

Parameter.Documentation: boolean that checks if we want to change the bookable service of the appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: boolean that checks if we want to change the bookable service of the appointment
Parameter.Name: isChange

Parameter.Documentation: String of the new service the customer wants
Parameter.Documentation_plain: String of the new service the customer wants
Parameter.Name: newService

Operation.Documentation:
The CancelAppointment method takes for input the username of the customer, his appointment nameand the date and start time of the appointment.This method cancels an appointment that is already in the system.If the cancelation is unsuccessful for various reasons, the system will throw an error.The first two input parameters are always the same unless it is a random user or the owner that istrying to cancel the appointment of a customer. The system then throws an error saying it isimpossible.

@author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Documentation_plain: The CancelAppointment method takes for input the username of the customer, his appointment nameand the date and start time of the appointment.This method cancels an appointment that is already in the system.If the cancelation is unsuccessful for various reasons, the system will throw an error.The first two input parameters are always the same unless it is a random user or the owner that istrying to cancel the appointment of a customer. The system then throws an error saying it isimpossible. @author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Name: cancelAppointment
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException

Parameter.Documentation: is a username
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is a username
Parameter.Name: user

Parameter.Documentation: is the customer's username
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the customer's username
Parameter.Name: username

Parameter.Documentation: is the service name and the appointment name to be cancelled
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the service name and the appointment name to be cancelled
Parameter.Name: serviceName

Parameter.Documentation: is the date of the appointment before cancellation
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the date of the appointment before cancellation
Parameter.Name: date

Parameter.Documentation: is the time of the appointment before cancellation
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the time of the appointment before cancellation
Parameter.Name: startTimeString

Operation.Name: startAppointment
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException An error being thrown when the attempt to start an appointment does not meet the correct conditions. This method is called when an appointment needs to be started when its starting time arrives.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException An error being thrown when the attempt to start an appointment does not meet the correct conditions. This method is called when an appointment needs to be started when its starting time arrives.

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the appointment.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the appointment.
Parameter.Name: appName

Parameter.Documentation: the date of the appointment in concern.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the date of the appointment in concern.
Parameter.Name: dateString

Parameter.Documentation: the starting time of the appointment in concern.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the starting time of the appointment in concern.
Parameter.Name: startTimeString

Operation.Name: endAppointment
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException An error being thrown when the attempt to end an appointment does not meet the correct conditions. This method called when an appointment is done and is needed to be ended.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException An error being thrown when the attempt to end an appointment does not meet the correct conditions. This method called when an appointment is done and is needed to be ended.

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the customer.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the customer.
Parameter.Name: username

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the appointment.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the appointment.
Parameter.Name: appName

Parameter.Documentation: the date of the appointment in concern.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the date of the appointment in concern.
Parameter.Name: dateString

Parameter.Documentation: he starting time of the appointment in concern.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: he starting time of the appointment in concern.
Parameter.Name: startTimeString

Operation.Name: registerNoShow
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException An error being thrown when the attempt to register a no-show does not meet the correct conditions. This method is called when a customer does not show up and the owner wants to register a no-show due to their absence.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException An error being thrown when the attempt to register a no-show does not meet the correct conditions. This method is called when a customer does not show up and the owner wants to register a no-show due to their absence.

Parameter.Documentation: The name of the customer.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The name of the customer.
Parameter.Name: customerName

Parameter.Documentation: The name of the appointment.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The name of the appointment.
Parameter.Name: appointment

Parameter.Documentation: Method to set the system date and time
Parameter.Documentation_plain: Method to set the system date and time
Parameter.Name: time

Operation.Documentation:
Helper method that throws valid InvalidInputExceptions, when parameters of a serviceto be added are invalid and raise errors.

@author Marc Saber
Operation.Documentation_plain: Helper method that throws valid InvalidInputExceptions, when parameters of a serviceto be added are invalid and raise errors. @author Marc Saber
Operation.Name: serviceSpecificationAdd
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException when invalid parameters are set.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException when invalid parameters are set.

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the added service.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of the added service.
Parameter.Name: serviceName

Parameter.Documentation: is the duration of the added service.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the duration of the added service.
Parameter.Name: duration

Parameter.Documentation: is downtime time of the added service.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is downtime time of the added service.
Parameter.Name: downtimeDuration

Parameter.Documentation: is the downtime start time of the added service.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the downtime start time of the added service.
Parameter.Name: downtimeStart

Operation.Documentation:
Helper method that throws valid InvalidInputExceptions, when parameters of a serviceto be updated are invalid and raise errors.

@author Marc Saber
Operation.Documentation_plain: Helper method that throws valid InvalidInputExceptions, when parameters of a serviceto be updated are invalid and raise errors. @author Marc Saber
Operation.Name: serviceSpecificationUpdate
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws InvalidInputException when invalid parameters are set.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws InvalidInputException when invalid parameters are set.

Parameter.Documentation: is the corresponding updated service.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the corresponding updated service.
Parameter.Name: service

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the service to be found.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of the service to be found.
Parameter.Name: serviceName

Parameter.Documentation: is the updated duration of the service.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the updated duration of the service.
Parameter.Name: duration

Parameter.Documentation: is the updated downtime time of the service.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the updated downtime time of the service.
Parameter.Name: downtimeDuration

Parameter.Documentation: is the updated start time of the downtime of a service.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the updated start time of the downtime of a service.
Parameter.Name: downtimeStart

Operation.Documentation:
Helper method to get the service combos

@author Marc Saber
Operation.Documentation_plain: Helper method to get the service combos @author Marc Saber
Operation.Name: getServiceCombos
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: the list of service combos
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: the list of service combos

Operation.Name: findOwner
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: Owner

Operation.Name: findCustomer
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: Customer

Operation.Documentation:
findSerivceComboThis helper method has the goal of finding a specific service combo holding the name put as the input.To do that the method iterates over all the bookable services in the flexibook using a for loop.For each bookable service, if it is a service combo and it has the same name as the one in the input,then it is the service combo we are looking for and it is then returned by the method.

@author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Documentation_plain: findSerivceComboThis helper method has the goal of finding a specific service combo holding the name put as the input.To do that the method iterates over all the bookable services in the flexibook using a for loop.For each bookable service, if it is a service combo and it has the same name as the one in the input,then it is the service combo we are looking for and it is then returned by the method. @author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Name: findServiceCombo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ServiceCombo that has the name as the parameter serviceCombo.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ServiceCombo that has the name as the parameter serviceCombo.

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the service combo to be found.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of the service combo to be found.
Parameter.Name: serviceCombo

Operation.Documentation:
findServiceThis helper method has the goal of finding a specific service holding the name put as the input.To do that the method iterates over all the bookable services in the flexibook using a for loop.For each bookable service, if it is a service and it has the same name as the one in the input,then it is the service we are looking for and it is then returned by the method.

@author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Documentation_plain: findServiceThis helper method has the goal of finding a specific service holding the name put as the input.To do that the method iterates over all the bookable services in the flexibook using a for loop.For each bookable service, if it is a service and it has the same name as the one in the input,then it is the service we are looking for and it is then returned by the method. @author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Name: findService
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: Service that has the name as the parameter service.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: Service that has the name as the parameter service.

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the service to be found.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of the service to be found.
Parameter.Name: service

Operation.Documentation:
The findTimeSlotOfApp is a helper method that calculates the time slot of an appointmentdepending on the start time, start date and duration of the appointment.

@author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Documentation_plain: The findTimeSlotOfApp is a helper method that calculates the time slot of an appointmentdepending on the start time, start date and duration of the appointment. @author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Name: findTimeSlotOfApp
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: TimeSlot

Parameter.Documentation: is the service name
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the service name
Parameter.Name: serviceName

Parameter.Documentation: is the optional services
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the optional services
Parameter.Name: optServicesString

Operation.Documentation:
The findAppointment method is a helper method that finds the desired appointment in the flexibookapplication using the username of the customer, and his appointment information(name, date, starttime).

@author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Documentation_plain: The findAppointment method is a helper method that finds the desired appointment in the flexibookapplication using the username of the customer, and his appointment information(name, date, starttime). @author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Name: findAppointment
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: Appointment

Operation.Documentation:
The findBookabkleService is a helper method that finds the desired Bookable Service, iea normal service or a service combo.

@author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Documentation_plain: The findBookabkleService is a helper method that finds the desired Bookable Service, iea normal service or a service combo. @author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Name: findBookableService
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: BookableService

Operation.Documentation:
This method is to check if a time slot is within another time slot by comparing the two starttimes, the dates and the end times.If it returns true then the time slot is within the other, if it returns false then they aretwo disjoint time slots.

@author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method is to check if a time slot is within another time slot by comparing the two starttimes, the dates and the end times.If it returns true then the time slot is within the other, if it returns false then they aretwo disjoint time slots. @author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Name: s2_isWithin_s1
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: boolean
